The package represents a complete pipeline: it takes raw PB / ONT reads as input and outputs polished contigs.

Shotgun Metagenomics allow to quickly obtain a representation of microorganisms genomes characterizing a particular environment. In order to obtain a fast e reliable taxonomic classification of microorganisms genomes we present kMetaShot, an alignment-free taxonomic classifier based on k-mer/minimizer counting.

bio.tool description: Wtdbg2 is a de novo sequence assembler for long noisy reads produced by PacBio or Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT). It assembles raw reads without error correction and then builds the consensus from intermediate assembly output. Wtdbg2 is able to assemble the human and even the 32Gb Axolotl genome at a speed tens of times faster than CANU and FALCON while producing contigs of comparable base accuracy.

Description: This tool is a wrapper for OGC API Processes (OTB) coming from the Zoo Project (https://zoo-project.github.io/docs/intro.html) and was created using the OGC-API-Process2Galaxy tool (https://github.com/AquaINFRA/OGC-API-Process2Galaxy). Check the README in the repository for more information.
